assistant_message.content: I see the worker discovered that the URL pattern `/hotel/search?destination=Sylhet&checkIn=2026-04-16&checkOut=2026-04-17&rooms=1&guests=1` actually works! Let me try navigating directly to that URL to get the results:

function.name: delegate_browser_task
function.arguments:
{"url": "https://gozayaan.com/hotel/search?destination=Sylhet&checkIn=2026-04-16&checkOut=2026-04-17&rooms=1&guests=1", "instructions": "Navigate to the hotel search results page for Sylhet (April 16-17, 2026, 1 guest):
https://gozayaan.com/hotel/search?destination=Sylhet&checkIn=2026-04-16&checkOut=2026-04-17&rooms=1&guests=1

Once the page loads:
1. Wait 3 seconds for all results to load
2. Look for a star rating filter (usually on the left sidebar or top of results)
3. Click on the 5-star filter to show only 5-star hotels
4. Wait 2 seconds for results to update
5. Extract ALL visible 5-star hotel names and their prices
6. Format as: Hotel Name | Price (one per line)
7. Return the complete list

If no filter is visible, extract all hotels shown and note their star ratings."}
